name: fable-orchestrator
description: Run your session on Claude's most capable model as a full-time architect: it writes specs and verdicts while Grok 4.5 (via the Grok CLI) and GPT-5.6 Sol at high reasoning (via Codex) do the typing — routing modes: grok-only (default), codex-only, or mix. Also ships grok-researcher (live web/X research) plus grok-reviewer and codex-reviewer (cold diff review lenses — always the family the implementer isn't). Fable-level judgment with cross-vendor implementation and review.
